heading: Actions and votes of representatives
label: 2023 Actions and votes of representatives
text: The representatives provided for in , when representing the United States in the organs of the Agency, shall, at all times, act in accordance with the instructions of the President, and such representatives shall, in accordance with such instructions, cast any and all votes under the Statute of the International Atomic Energy Agency.section 2021 of this title
notes: Termination of Authority Under This SectionAuthority under this section to terminate if Senate refuses its advice and consent by a formal vote to an amendment to the Statute of the Agency, see .section 2026 of this title
